channel.title: Neuroscience on Dario Arcos-Díaz, PhD
channel.description: Recent content in Neuroscience on Dario Arcos-Díaz, PhD

item.title: Classifying brain regions from gene expression RNA-seq data
item.description: I trained an XGBoost classifier on GTEx bulk RNA-seq to distinguish 13 brain regions. It got 95% accuracy, and the top identified genes are also known tissue markers in neuroscience.
